openmeter/billing/charges/usagebased/ser.purpose: Stateless usage-rating orchestrator for usage-based charges: snapshots metered quantity from ClickHouse (via streaming.Connector) at a stored-at cutoff and dispatches to a sub-engine (delta production engine / periodpreserving experimental engine, both built on the subtract primitive) to produce DetailedLines or totals. No DB writes — persistence is owned by callers in the run package.

patterns.name: Config-struct constructor with Validate()
patterns.description: New(Config) validates required fields before constructing the service, and every exported input type implements Validate() called at the top of the method body.
patterns.example: func New(config Config) (Service, error) { if err := config.Validate(); err != nil { return nil, err } ... }

patterns.name: StoredAtLT cutoff in every ClickHouse query
patterns.description: snapshotQuantity always sets FilterStoredAt.Lt = &in.StoredAtLT in the QueryMeter call so usage is bounded to a deterministic point in time, enabling idempotent re-rating.

patterns.name: Engine dispatch via charge.State.RatingEngine
patterns.description: GetDetailedRatingForUsage switches on charge.State.RatingEngine (RatingEngineDelta or RatingEnginePeriodPreserving) with a default error case — no silent fallback.
patterns.example: switch charge.State.RatingEngine { case usagebased.RatingEngineDelta: ... default: return ..., fmt.Errorf("unsupported rating engine: %s", ...) }

patterns.name: Voided + current-run exclusion before subtraction
patterns.description: eligibleRealizations filters out IsVoidedBillingHistory() runs and keeps only runs with ServicePeriodTo strictly before the current ServicePeriodTo, so the current run is never subtracted from itself.
patterns.example: lo.Filter(charge.Realizations, func(run usagebased.RealizationRun, _ int) bool { if run.IsVoidedBillingHistory() { return false }; return run.ServicePeriodTo.Before(in.ServicePeriodTo) })

patterns.name: Lazy DetailedLines loading via fetcher interface
patterns.description: ensureDetailedLinesLoadedForRating only calls detailedLinesFetcher.FetchDetailedLines when some prior eligible run lacks DetailedLines.IsPresent(); rating refuses to proceed with incomplete prior runs.
patterns.example: if !lo.EveryBy(charge.Realizations, func(run ...) bool { ... return run.DetailedLines.IsPresent() }) { s.detailedLinesFetcher.FetchDetailedLines(ctx, charge) }

patterns.name: WithCreditsMutatorDisabled() on all rating calls
patterns.description: Both GetTotalsForUsage and GetDetailedRatingForUsage pass billingrating.WithCreditsMutatorDisabled() so credit allocation is deferred to run creation, not applied during raw rating.

patterns.name: Totals-only fast path
patterns.description: GetTotalsForUsage skips detailed-line construction and returns ratingResult.Totals — preferred for pre-advance checks where only totals are needed.
patterns.example: totals, err := svc.GetTotalsForUsage(ctx, GetTotalsForUsageInput{Charge: charge, StoredAtLT: storedAt})

key_file_guides.role: Service interface (GetTotalsForUsage, GetDetailedRatingForUsage, GetPreferredRatingEngineFor), Config + Validate, and New constructor building deltaRater and periodPreservingRater.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Pure computation — no Ent/DB dependency. DetailedLinesFetcher is an injected interface; never inject an adapter directly.

key_file_guides.role: GetDetailedRatingForUsage: ensureDetailedLinesLoadedForRating, snapshotQuantity, then dispatch to deltaRater or ratePeriodPreservingDetails.
key_file_guides.watch_for: The current run (ServicePeriodTo == run.ServicePeriodTo) is excluded from eligibleRealizations — never include it as a prior run.

key_file_guides.role: GetTotalsForUsage: snapshots quantity, calls GenerateDetailedLines with credits-mutator-disabled + optional ignore-minimum-commitment, returns ratingResult.Totals only.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Does NOT suffix ChildUniqueReferenceIDs — that belongs in the delta/periodpreserving engines.

key_file_guides.role: Private snapshotQuantity helper building QueryMeter params with FilterStoredAt + group-by filters and summing rows.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Validation errors are wrapped as billing.ValidationError{Err: err}; reuse that wrapper for new validations.

anti_patterns: Adding Ent/DB adapter calls inside this package — persistence is exclusively the caller's responsibility.
Calling snapshotQuantity without a non-zero StoredAtLT — every ClickHouse query must be stored-at bounded for idempotent re-rating.
Including the current run in eligibleRealizations — it will be subtracted from itself and produce a zero bill.
Passing voided realizations as AlreadyBilledDetailedLines — IsVoidedBillingHistory() runs must be filtered out before subtraction.
Omitting WithCreditsMutatorDisabled() when calling GenerateDetailedLines — credit allocation must be deferred to run creation.

decisions.decision: Stateless package with no DB dependency.
decisions.rationale: Rating is pure computation (snapshot usage + apply rate card), making it trivially testable with MockStreamingConnector and reusable across callers without transaction concerns.

decisions.decision: Engine selection at dispatch time via charge.State.RatingEngine.
decisions.rationale: Delta is production-safe while period-preserving is experimental; the charge carries its own engine preference without the caller knowing engine internals.

decisions.decision: Lazy DetailedLines loading via a fetcher interface rather than caller pre-loading.
decisions.rationale: Prior runs are usually already expanded; the fetcher avoids redundant DB round-trips while providing a safe fallback when lines are missing.

code_examples.scenario: Rate a usage-based charge and retrieve detailed lines with the stored-at cutoff
